title: oenothera pallida var. runcinata
intro: Oenothera pallida var. runcinata, also known as a type of evening primrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA). The health benefits of Oenothera pallida var. runcinata include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and premenstrual syndrome. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to support reproductive health and promote overall well-being.
